subcodes.first_line: Say: O my God, my God! All praise be unto Thee for having created me and sustained me and enabled me to recognize Thy mighty Utterance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل الهی الهی لک الحمد بما خلقتنی و رزقتنی و عرفتنی بیانک العظیم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat], @love of God
